# zstack_affinity_groups (Data Source)

Query ZStack Affinity Groups by name, name pattern, or additional filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block List) Filter results by field values. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `name` (String) Exact name for querying an affinity group.
- `name_pattern` (String) Pattern for fuzzy matching affinity group names. Use % or _ like SQL.

### Read-Only

- `affinity_groups` (Attributes List) List of matched affinity groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--affinity_groups))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the field to filter by.
- `values` (Set of String) List of values to match. Treated as OR conditions.


<a id="nestedatt--affinity_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `affinity_groups`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of the affinity group.
- `name` (String) Name of the affinity group.
- `policy` (String) Placement policy (antiSoft, antiHard, proSoft, proHard).
- `state` (String) State of the affinity group (Enabled, Disabled).
- `type` (String) Type of the affinity group.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the affinity group.
- `zone_uuid` (String) UUID of the zone.
